changes: Removed V138M strong tree anchor multiplier from spriteAnchorSink.
Reset exact V138M forced pines groundSink to normal 2.0 at placement.
Added conservative V138N solid-foot correction based on solid-alpha bottom padding; excludes flowers/grass/litter/pinecones/needles/walls/decals.
Added V138N post-pass to normalize any tree groundSink >2.75 back to 2.0 for true tree texture IDs only.
Added main-road tower-to-beach flower spacing pass with minDistance 4.05 regardless of flower color.
Softened historic no-vase flower colors by reducing saturation and contrast without changing shape or adding ground shadow.
